subject: grammar
title: Cohesion: Referencing in an Essay
instruction:
Match the sentence beginnings (1-7) to the endings (a-g) from an essay about camera invention to create coherent sentences. 
 
 Prompt: 'The camera has changed the way we look at the world and the way that we celebrate special occasions.' To what extent do you agree with this statement?

options.a: has brought many changes to our lives.
options.b: the way we see and experience the world.
options.c: and use it to create photographic records of their experiences.
options.d: more important than the event or experience it is recording?
options.e: cameras often have a primary role.
options.f: with the enjoyment of the occasion.
options.g: so that it can be remembered in the future.

questions.text: Most adults in this country have a camera these days
On important occasions such as weddings,
However, it is also true that the photographs record the event
